boundaryNote: Repo-local Kiwi capability is built into the product. Machine-global parity measures optional external setup that Kiwi can benefit from, but does not treat as canonical repo truth.

repoLocalCapabilities.label: Runtime-backed canonical truth
repoLocalCapabilities.detail: Runtime-backed canonical state, identity proof, and CLI↔desktop parity are built into Kiwi Control.

repoLocalCapabilities.label: Repo graph and impact analysis
repoLocalCapabilities.detail: Repo map, symbol index, dependency graph, impact map, and compact context packs are available repo-locally.

repoLocalCapabilities.label: Decision, history, and review intelligence
repoLocalCapabilities.detail: Decision graph, history graph, review graph, and review context packs are produced from repo-local continuity and runtime artifacts.

machineGlobalCapabilities.label: ai-setup bootstrap helper
machineGlobalCapabilities.detail: The repo initializer exists on this machine.

machineGlobalCapabilities.label: Structural code graph tooling
machineGlobalCapabilities.detail: Graph-backed structural search and impact queries across Claude Code, Codex, and Copilot runtimes.

machineGlobalCapabilities.label: Shell/token compression
machineGlobalCapabilities.detail: Machine-global shell compression and token reduction for supported harnesses.

machineGlobalCapabilities.label: Codebase summary tooling
machineGlobalCapabilities.detail: Compressed codebase summaries used as optional planning accelerators.

machineGlobalCapabilities.label: Output sandboxing
machineGlobalCapabilities.detail: Useful but optional containment for verbose tool output.

machineGlobalCapabilities.label: Planning orchestration layer
machineGlobalCapabilities.detail: Optional machine-global planning orchestration beyond Kiwi’s repo-local control plane.

machineGlobalCapabilities.label: Execution orchestration layer
machineGlobalCapabilities.detail: Optional execution orchestration layer for tmux/team workflows.

machineGlobalCapabilities.label: Claude Code global config
machineGlobalCapabilities.detail: Claude Code instructions and MCP wiring.

machineGlobalCapabilities.label: Codex global config
machineGlobalCapabilities.detail: Codex MCP wiring and global instructions.

machineGlobalCapabilities.label: Copilot global config
machineGlobalCapabilities.detail: Copilot MCP config and plugin registry.

machineGlobalCapabilities.label: Claude usage telemetry
machineGlobalCapabilities.detail: Claude token telemetry through ccusage when available.
evidence: Measured Claude usage came from ccusage daily output.

machineGlobalCapabilities.label: Codex session telemetry
machineGlobalCapabilities.detail: Codex local session-log telemetry. Partial means the runtime is present but no recent measurable sessions were found.
evidence: Measured Codex usage came from local session logs.

machineGlobalCapabilities.label: Copilot plugin expansion
machineGlobalCapabilities.detail: Optional Copilot assistant expansion through installed plugins.
evidence: plugins: database-data-management, frontend-web-dev, openapi-to-application-python-fastapi, project-planning, polyglot-test-agent

machineGlobalCapabilities.label: Planning runtime readiness
machineGlobalCapabilities.detail: Machine-global planning readiness from optimization/runtime signals.

machineGlobalCapabilities.detail: Machine-global execution readiness from optimization/runtime signals.
